spec_match.rationale: Removal feature — page covers one slice (probe / migration / note) but the spec's full removal+replacement story is split across multiple concepts; this page can't carry it alone.

interactive.rationale: 3 buttons / 3 inputs / 0 selects / 3 ranges driving live JS — well past the static-card bar.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Concept page lede restates the feature-index blurb's key promise (overlap on bucket, distribution, epsilon, histogram).

edge_cases.rationale: Page handles real failure modes — feature detection, permission rejection, fallback paths are all wired into the script.

references.rationale: Page includes the chromestatus.com/feature/4683382919397376 link in the see-also section.

design_system.rationale: Mostly on the design system but 4 raw hex literal(s) leaked into inline CSS — should be replaced with the --accent / --text / --bg variables.

runtime_evidence.rationale: Fresh Chrome DevTools MCP v152 sweep loaded the copied concept, exercised every detected control, found named controls, and reported no post-triage runtime/action failure.

conformance.rationale: A v152 suite now carries the same feature-ID/spec contract without modifying the immutable source-milestone suite.

openQuestions.title: Cover the spec aspect: concrete aggregation use cases that disappear
openQuestions.detail: The deprecate-and-remove-private-aggregation-api feature's headline framing — Private Aggregation API removal — aggregated cross-site measurement goes away — calls out "concrete aggregation use cases that disappear". This concept page does not exercise that, so the spec story is incomplete from this page alone. Either extend this demo or land a sibling concept dedicated to it.

openQuestions.title: Cover the spec aspect: third-party cookies as the replacement signal
openQuestions.detail: The deprecate-and-remove-private-aggregation-api feature's headline framing — Private Aggregation API removal — aggregated cross-site measurement goes away — calls out "third-party cookies as the replacement signal". This concept page does not exercise that, so the spec story is incomplete from this page alone. Either extend this demo or land a sibling concept dedicated to it.

openQuestions.title: Replace raw hex colours with design-system variables
openQuestions.detail: Found 4 raw hex literal(s) in the inline <style> block. The shared system defines --accent-blue, --accent-emerald, --accent-rose, --bg-ivory, --bg-paper, --bg-stone, --text-black, --text-charcoal, --text-muted. Swap them in and re-check WCAG AA contrast.

summary: histogram-explorer under deprecate-and-remove-private-aggregation-api: 4 pass / 2 partial / 0 fail. Strong interactive surface, design-system drift, spec story is partial — see open questions for the angles still missing.
